titleStmt.title: SII 9.616: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 616. (A.R. No. 12 of 1904.) ON THE SOUTH BASE OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE VITTHALASVAMI TEMPLE AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhi, Phālguṇa, śu. 1 corresponding to A.D. 1545 February 12, Thursday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivadēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Kōnēṭi-Timmarāja, son of Koṇḍarāja, made a gift of the toll-revenue raised in Ṟavuḍūr for offerings to the god Viṭṭhaladēva on the day of Rathasaptamī. The gift was made for the merit of Koṇḍarāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaṣakavaruśa 1466 neya krōdhisaṁvatsarada phālguṇa śu 1 lu śrīmatu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāśivadēvarāyamahārāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁ geyiUtaṁ yiralu koṁḍarājagaḷa makkaḷu konēṭi tiṁmarājayanavaru naṁma taṁdegaḷu koṁḍarājagaḷige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāga bēkū yeṁdu rathasapta�mo pu(ṁ)ṇyada kāladalli
śrīviṭhaladēvara pulivaṭṭu naivēdyakke haṭivaḷiya sīmeyoḷage śrīviṭhaladēvara Amrutapaḍige saluva ṟauḍūra grāmada staḷa suṁka grāmada prajegaḷu koḍuva Uḍugoṟeya rokka gāṇa mara Aṁgaḍi paṭakāṟaru koḍuva roka Ī grāmada staḷa suṁkake saluva Ēnuṁṭāda tējōpārjaneyanu nānu śrīviṭaladēvarige sarvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi samarpi stenū yidakke dinakke naivēdyakke naḍava kaṭaḷe Aki ¥
hesaru ¥ = Upu meṇasu ¥ = saṁbhāra śē ¥ . mēlōgara ¥ = tupa ¥ = mosaru ¥ = Aḍugabu ¥ . Aḍike lekhadalū naḍeyaluḷadū yaṁdu barasida dharmaśāsana .
Digital edition of SII 9.616 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
